name: ownware
description: ownware monorepo — ownware (umbrella) + loom (agent engine) + cortex (agent kernel & gateway) + bundled profiles

scripts.build: bun run --filter='@ownware/loom' build && bun run --filter='@ownware/cortex' build && bun run --filter='ownware' build && bun run --filter='@ownware/client' build && bun run --filter='@ownware/ui' build && bun run --filter='@ownware/react' build && bun run --filter='@ownware/shuttle' build
scripts.quickstart: bun run build && echo '' && echo '  Built. Now:  bun run ownware init  ->  bun run ownware run assistant "hello"  ->  bun run ownware serve' && echo '  walkthrough: examples/quickstart/README.md' && echo ''
scripts.release:version: changeset version && node scripts/sync-package-versions.mjs && bun install --lockfile-only
